United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: NFL Live
programme.desc: Host Laura Rutledge takes the helm of this weekday show featuring the likes of Marcus Spears, Dan Orlovsky, Mina Kimes, and Adam Schefter. The "NFL Live" crew entertains fans while offering all the latest news and analysis from across the NFL.

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: Live: Pardon the Interruption
programme.desc: The debate is the story in this fast-paced, half-hour series hosted by former Washington Post sportswriters Tony Kornheiser and Michael Wilbon. The pair engage in high-energy discussions, conduct interviews and often argue over topics not even related to sports. Other sports reporters appear as guests and offer opinions on the top stories of the day.

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: Live: NCAA Men's College World Series Studio
programme.desc: College baseball experts help viewers stay informed about NCAA Men's College World Series action.

programme.title: Live: 2026 Men's College World Series
programme.desc: Championship Series, Game 3. (If necessary).

programme.title: Live: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: The Atlanta Braves face the San Diego Padres at Petco Park in an opening match of a three-game series. Atlanta's right-handed pitcher Grant Holmes (4.33 ERA) is the probable starter against San Diego's right-handed pitcher Michael King (3.60 ERA).

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: Live: Get Up
programme.desc: ESPN's morning show features host Mike Greenberg with a rotating and diverse group of analysts opining about and analyzing the latest news from the world of sports. The two-hour, personality-driven show originates from Hudson Square in Lower Manhattan, a modern media hub for ESPN and The Walt Disney Company's New York-based teams. Greenberg, aka "Greeny," is formerly one-half of ESPN Radio's longt

programme.title: Live: First Take
programme.desc: Stephen A. Smith hosts this weekday morning sports debate show. Smith provides his expert takes on the day's trending sports topics and under-the-radar news. They're regularly joined by veteran analysts and the top guests in sports and entertainment.

programme.title: Live: The Pat McAfee Show
programme.desc: Former NFL punter Pat McAfee brings his humor and candor to the microphone to highlight the day's top stories.

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: Live: NBA Today
programme.desc: In-depth, comprehensive daily coverage of all aspects of the NBA from expert analysts.

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: 2026 NBA Draft
programme.desc: NBA teams select basketball standouts to begin their professional careers, from Barclays Center in Brooklyn, N.Y.C.

programme.title: Live: 2026 NBA Draft
programme.desc: NBA teams select basketball standouts to begin their professional careers, from Barclays Center in Brooklyn, N.Y.C.

programme.title: College Basketball
programme.desc: The No. 1 Arizona Wildcats host Texas Tech for a national showcase in a sold-out McKale Center. Brayden Burries and the top-ranked Wildcats look to bounce back against a gritty Red Raiders squad led by JT Toppin in this Big 12 primetime matchup.

programme.title: SEC Storied
programme.desc: Exploring the rise, fall and rebirth of a legendary coach and a time when the state of Arkansas was at the epicenter of American culture.

programme.title: Live: 2026 Men's College World Series
programme.desc: Championship Series, Game 3. (If necessary).

programme.title: SEC Storied
programme.desc: The story of a 3-pointer that saved thousands of lives during the 2008 SEC Men's basketball tournament.

programme.title: SEC Storied
programme.desc: Former basketball great Shaquille O'Neal returns to LSU to visit Dale Brown, the coach who helped make it all possible.

programme.title: SEC Storied
programme.desc: When Dominique Wilkins chose the University of Georgia over local ACC schools, his hometown of Washington, North Carolina felt betrayed.

programme.title: SEC Storied
programme.desc: The life of Missouri men's basketball coaching legend, Norm Stewart.

programme.title: SEC Storied
programme.desc: Ruthie Bolton, a gold medalist, former Auburn basketball player and survivor of domestic abuse, becomes an advocate for women around the world who live in fear of their spouses.

programme.title: 2026 Men's College World Series
programme.desc: Championship Series, Game 3. (If necessary).

programme.title: Live: Unsportsmanlike with Evan, Canty and Michelle
programme.desc: Start the day off right with Chris Canty, Evan Cohen and Michelle Smallmon providing an energizing and informative way to take on the day. Sports, life and laughter are what it's all about.

programme.title: College Basketball
programme.desc: The No. 22 BYU visits No. 1 Arizona at the McKale Center in a high-stakes Big 12 rematch. Arizona is looking to rebound after a difficult week that saw them lose their Big 12 No. 1 ranking, while BYU aims to prove their winning streak is no fluke.

programme.title: College Basketball
programme.desc: No. 4 Arizona travels to Fertitta Center to face No. 2 Houston in a high-stakes battle for the top spot in the Big 12. Houston holds a slim lead over Arizona for first place in the conference. Kingston Flemings leads Houston in scoring and assists.

programme.title: College Basketball
programme.desc: In a Big 12 showdown, the No. 4 Arizona Wildcats travel to Waco to face the Baylor Bears at Foster Pavilion. This matchup features an Arizona squad contending for the conference title against a Baylor team looking to secure a signature home win.

programme.title: SEC Storied
programme.desc: The University of Florida, featuring Joakim Noah, Al Horford, Corey Brewer, Taurean Green and Lee Humphrey wins back-to-back NCAA crowns.

programme.title: Boys High School Basketball
programme.desc: From Barclays Center in Brooklyn, N.Y.

programme.desc: From Dell Diamond in Round Rock, Texas.

programme.title: Premier League Review
programme.desc: A review of the biggest moments and best action from the 2025/26 season.

programme.title: Fairways of Life
programme.desc: New York Times's Best Seller and Golf Channel Host Matt Adams provides unforgettable interviews with golf's legends and stars, as well as lively interactive discussions about the game, travel and the latest in golf equipment.

programme.title: Swing Clinic With Jimmy Hanlin
programme.desc: Golf tips, strategy and review of products.

programme.title: Golfing the World
programme.desc: Highlighting golf courses and private resorts from around the world.

programme.title: Golf Life
programme.desc: Featuring the latest trends, tours of the finest courses and tips from golf experts.

programme.title: Denver's Next Great Neighborhood
programme.desc: The Ball Arena Redevelopment Project is a bold reimagining of how we live, work, and play downtown. We will hear from the visionaries, builders, and believers on how this will transform our city and become Denver's Next Great Neighborhood.

programme.title: Major League Fishing
programme.desc: Four teams compete in Elimination Match 1 of the Challenge Cup to advance to the Knockout Rounds. From Port Huron, Mich.

programme.title: A Fishing Story With Ronnie Green
programme.desc: La'Tonya Blanding shares her inspiring journey into the world of fishing, reflecting on the experiences that shaped her love for the sport. She opens up about the people and moments that sparked her passion, revealing how fishing has become both a source of joy and a powerful outlet for personal growth and connection.

programme.title: Pure Outdoor
programme.desc: Outdoor sports from all over the world, from freestyle ski jumping to airplane aerobatics.

programme.title: Offroad Odyssey
programme.desc: Adrenaline-pumping action, breathtaking scenery, and unforgettable encounter off-road.

programme.title: She's in the Game
programme.desc: Meet the next generation of superstar female athletes around the country as we go behind the scenes to shine the light on them and their interests off the field, along with catching up with the female legends who paved the way for all this growth.

programme.title: Sports Stars of Tomorrow
programme.desc: Jared Sullinger; top five prospects from Southeast; Doron Lamb; Kendall Marshall; national play of the week; Tony Wroten, Jr.; top ten.

programme.title: The Short List
programme.desc: The sports countdown, featuring iconic themes focused upon the memorable moments and individuals in sports; the 10 memorable debuts, the 10 revered innovators, the comebacks of all time and much more.

programme.title: Invincible
programme.desc: Periods of unrivaled domination in sport, including chapters from sport's greatest careers and iconic dynasties.

programme.title: The Iconic
programme.desc: Stories behind celebrated events, institutions, clubs, players, rivalries and moments in sport.

programme.desc: New York Times's Best Seller and Golf Channel Host Matt Adams provides unforgettable interviews with golf's legends and stars, as well as lively interactive discussions about the game, travel and the latest in golf equipment.

programme.title: RateEscape: Stop Overpaying For Cellular
programme.desc: Cut up to half the cost of your monthly cell phone bill; same towers, same coverage, but a lot less money; it sounds great but is it too good to be true?; join myth-busting legend Kari Byron as she takes on Big Wireless to save you money.

programme.title: Ready for a safer shower? Enjoy a one-day bath remodel with Jacuzzi.
programme.desc: Trusted brand Jacuzzi Bath Remodel and interior designer Christina Hall share their secrets on how you can easily and affordably transform your bathroom into a gorgeous custom, safe, stylish space in 1 day! Call for a FREE quote & installation.

programme.title: Pain Relief Revealed
programme.desc: Discover the hidden story of OmegaXL with John Walsh. He dives deep into the groundbreaking supplement that promises hope and relief for millions battling joint pain and inflammation.

programme.title: RateEscape: Stop Overpaying For Cellular
programme.desc: Cut up to half the cost of your monthly cell phone bill; same towers, same coverage, but a lot less money; it sounds great but is it too good to be true?; join myth-busting legend Kari Byron as she takes on Big Wireless to save you money.

programme.title: Joint Relief Revolution
programme.desc: Join Connie Craig-Carroll and health visionary Ken Meares as they uncover OmegaXL, the groundbreaking natural supplement transforming lives by tackling joint pain and inflammation.

programme.title: Live MLB
programme.desc: San Diego Padres v Atlanta Braves (Start-time 3.10am). Coverage of the National League match from Petco Park. These two sides last met at this venue in the opening series of 2025, as the hosts won all four games to get their season off to a perfect start. programme.title: The Gamekeepers of Mossy Oak
programme.desc: This week, Dr. Marcus Lashley of the University of Florida joins us to explain his team's ongoing wild turkey poult research. It's fascinating stuff. Listen to the full conversation on Gamekeeper Podcast #332.

programme.title: Adventures of Chapo Gringo
programme.desc: Follow our fearless host, Robert Beall, aka 'Chapo Gringo', as he guides you through heart-pounding escapades across the globe in search of thrilling hunts and unparalleled experiences. In each episode, Robert immerses viewers in breathtaking landscapes while sharing his passion for the outdoors. With his charismatic personality and quick wit, Robert ensures non-stop entertainment and laughter thr

programme.title: Roger Raglin Outdoors
programme.desc: Roger targets and shoots an old mature buck in South Texas.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steve and chef Jesse Griffiths target redfish and sea trout with guide JT Van Zandt and flounder with Capt. David Dupnik and wind up with a feast.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steve and Jesse hunt nilgai, a large Indian antelope; the duo butchers a beast and dig into nose-to-tail dishes.

programme.title: Winchester Deadly Passion
programme.desc: Melissa travels the globe going head-to-head with various animals.

programme.title: Bloodline hunting
programme.desc: Travel with Matt Bullins as he journeys through grassroots America, seeking out new adventures and uncovering the rich bloodlines that define our hunting culture. Along the way, he highlights the people, histories, and experiences that keep these timeless traditions thriving.

programme.title: Night Crew
programme.desc: Who will win this round?

programme.title: Steve's Outdoor Adventures
programme.desc: SOA Hunting Consultant Travis Price hunts a new ranch in NW Colorado for bugling bulls in the aspens.

programme.title: Art of Wild
programme.desc: Nick relives one of his most memorable elk hunts of all time with his Grandpa in Colorado.

programme.title: Predator Pursuit
programme.desc: Predator Pursuit TV, hosted by Jeff Thomason, is a rare blend of fast action predator hunting and educational material all rolled into one. Jeff will be taking viewers all over the world chasing a variety of dangerous predators. Prepare to be entertained, and informed, on different tactics to help you become a more successful hunter and put more fur in the back of your truck!

programme.title: MOJO TV
programme.desc: Innovative designs for new hunting products.

programme.title: Jim Shockey's: The Professionals
programme.desc: The Professionals takes viewers behind the curtain into the life and career of Jim Shockey and team, the trials and tribulations of traveling to the world's most dangerous hunting destinations, the risks of political unrest in foreign lands, man-eating animals, deadly weather and more.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steve and chef Jesse Griffiths target redfish and sea trout with guide JT Van Zandt and flounder with Capt. David Dupnik and wind up with a feast.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steve and Jesse hunt nilgai, a large Indian antelope; the duo butchers a beast and dig into nose-to-tail dishes.

programme.title: Night Crew
programme.desc: Who will win this round?

programme.title: Steve's Outdoor Adventures
programme.desc: SOA Hunting Consultant Travis Price hunts a new ranch in NW Colorado for bugling bulls in the aspens.

programme.title: Art of Wild
programme.desc: Nick relives one of his most memorable elk hunts of all time with his Grandpa in Colorado.

programme.title: Predator Pursuit
programme.desc: Predator Pursuit TV, hosted by Jeff Thomason, is a rare blend of fast action predator hunting and educational material all rolled into one. Jeff will be taking viewers all over the world chasing a variety of dangerous predators. Prepare to be entertained, and informed, on different tactics to help you become a more successful hunter and put more fur in the back of your truck!

programme.title: MOJO TV
programme.desc: Innovative designs for new hunting products.

programme.title: Hit Squad Outdoors With Tim Sylvia
programme.desc: This week we have Leigh McNasty and Jeff Elliott looking for gators.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: A Michigan conservation officer looks into a case of a jet ski operator who was too close to shore as well as some illegal activity on an off-road vehicle.

programme.title: Grace Camo and Lace
programme.desc: Grace, Camo & Lace follows the Armstrong sisters on hunting adventures across North America. While in pursuit of big and small game, Alli and Adriana bring a fresh look and youthful energy to the hunting industry. The sisters have been hunting since they were five years old and share a passion for hunting and the outdoor lifestyle. The entire Armstrong family gets in on the action as they join All

programme.title: The Gamekeepers of Mossy Oak
programme.desc: This week, Dr. Marcus Lashley of the University of Florida joins us to explain his team's ongoing wild turkey poult research. It's fascinating stuff. Listen to the full conversation on Gamekeeper Podcast #332.

programme.title: In Fisherman TV
programme.desc: There's a love of the exploration of all things fishing, as the In-Fisherman staff takes you fishing for giant smallmouth buffalo; fishes big swimbaits for burly walleyes; and digs into our long-standing love affair with giant sportfish.

programme.title: The Fishmonger
programme.desc: Tommy Gomes is coast-to-coast on a mission to find the freshest sustainably harvested seafood around.

programme.title: Two Conchs Adventures
programme.desc: The Two Conchs Crew starts things out by visiting Key Largo Fisheries, before heading out on the water and doing a Cook your catch.

programme.title: Catching Bass With Dustin Wilks
programme.desc: Things get crazy fishing in hot summertime; Dustin catches lots of big bass, but also many chain pickerel.

programme.title: Angling Edge
programme.desc: Jeremy Smith and Jeff Simpson employ countdown tactics to pick off suspended basin crappies in fall's cold, clear water.

programme.title: Ducks Unlimited
programme.desc: Wade Borne, Jared Brown and Mike Checkett hunt in remote areas.

programme.title: Winchester Deadly Passion
programme.desc: Melissa travels the globe going head-to-head with various animals.

programme.title: Winchester & Drury's Natural Born
programme.desc: The Drury Outdoors Team hunts game and offers tips.

programme.title: MTN Top Outdoors
programme.desc: MTN Top Outdoors is brought to you by Butch Bauer and Jeremiah Voithofer, with a focus on the hunt, fish, cook mentality. They showcase a program promoting family values, commitment to the outdoors and making memories through experiences of hunting and fishing. At the end of every episode, we have a 3-minute cooking segment featuring 5-star culinary chef Hunt Chef - Jeremy Critchfield.

programme.title: Everything Eichler
programme.desc: A closer look at the Eichler Field to Table lifestyle; a combination of the daily challenges of ranching, farming and running an outfitting business in Colorado.

programme.title: Dropped: Project Origin
programme.desc: Miles upon miles remain on the trip, the brothers wonder if they should leave animals to find animals.

programme.title: JT Kenney's Florida Bass
programme.desc: Join pro angler JT Kenney as he embarks on an epic journey across Florida, navigating its diverse waters in pursuit of monstrous bass, showcasing the thrill of the chase and the beauty of the Sunshine State's landscapes.

programme.title: Angling Edge
programme.desc: Jeremy Smith and Jeff Simpson employ countdown tactics to pick off suspended basin crappies in fall's cold, clear water.

programme.title: Fishing 411
programme.desc: Host and producer Mark Romanack shares his 30-plus years of professional fishing savvy with viewers.

programme.title: Hook the Future
programme.desc: Kira and David experience the Everglades catching snook & triple tail along the way with Capt Don and Capt Shawn MacMullin out of Islamorada, Florida.

programme.title: Art of Wild
programme.desc: Nick relives one of his most memorable elk hunts of all time with his Grandpa in Colorado.

programme.title: MOJO TV
programme.desc: Innovative designs for new hunting products.

programme.title: Predator Pursuit
programme.desc: Predator Pursuit TV, hosted by Jeff Thomason, is a rare blend of fast action predator hunting and educational material all rolled into one. Jeff will be taking viewers all over the world chasing a variety of dangerous predators. Prepare to be entertained, and informed, on different tactics to help you become a more successful hunter and put more fur in the back of your truck!

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: A Michigan conservation officer looks into a case of a jet ski operator who was too close to shore as well as some illegal activity on an off-road vehicle.

programme.title: Dead Meat
programme.desc: Scott teams up with Texas native Jimmy Galindo to help eradicate some sometimes delicious, highly destructive critters.

programme.title: Guns & Ammo TV
programme.desc: The Aimpoint Duty RDS MR optic.

programme.title: Reel Animals
programme.desc: Captain Mike Anderson and Captain Sebastian Velez get on a great Trout bite in their home waters.

programme.title: Hook the Future
programme.desc: Kira and David experience the Everglades catching snook & triple tail along the way with Capt Don and Capt Shawn MacMullin out of Islamorada, Florida.

programme.title: Heartland Waterfowl
programme.desc: With frozen ponds and stale birds, the crew grinds through the final week of Canada goose season at home; armed with ice ripplers, scouting, and determination, they carve out success one frozen waterhole at a time.

programme.title: Our Way of Life
programme.desc: Heather Douville reconnects with her Tlingit heritage through teachings from her father, Mike Douville; a recognition of the critical need to safeguard traditional food sources and maintain ecosystem balance.

programme.title: Relentless Pursuit
programme.desc: Tim Wells hosts episode after episode featuring incredible shots on everything from hogs to frogs.

programme.title: Pigman: The Series
programme.desc: Brian Pigman Quaca is a true-blue original - an unapologetic, high-energy host with a larger-than-life personality that has redefined outdoor television. With an unrelenting passion for the chase, Pigman takes on the world's toughest hunts, using any legal means necessary to put game on the ground. While his reputation was built on hardcore hog hunting, don't be mistaken - his skills extend far be

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: On horseback, Steve stalks mule deer with Janis Putelis and Adam Weatherby in the Wyoming back country; snowfall complicates the hunt.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Still looking for game in Wyoming, Janis Putelis resorts to a mule deer drive; the trio uses an oven rack to help prepare venison ribs.

programme.title: Realtree's Monster Bucks
programme.desc: Bill Jordan explains how the late season can be the perfect time to take a monster buck.

programme.title: Backwoods Life
programme.desc: The Lee Family carries on a family tradition of quail hunting in South Georgia.

programme.title: Roger Raglin Outdoors
programme.desc: Roger targets and shoots an old mature buck in South Texas.

programme.title: World Cup Report
programme.desc: A comprehensive round-up of all the day's World Cup news.

programme.title: Live WNBA: Mercury @ Fever
programme.desc: The Indiana Fever face Phoenix Mercury in the WNBA.

programme.title: World Cup Report
programme.desc: A comprehensive round-up of all the day's World Cup news.

programme.title: World Cup Breakfast
programme.desc: A round-up of the all the breaking news stories from the 2026 FIFA World Cup, with live analysis and comment plus interviews with the headline makers.

programme.title: Live ICC Women's T20 WC: NZ v SCO
programme.desc: New Zealand play Scotland at the ICC Women's T20 World Cup.

programme.title: Live ICC Women's T20 WC: SL v IRE
programme.desc: Ireland face Sri Lanka at the ICC Women's T20 World Cup.

programme.title: Live ICC Women's T20 WC: AUS v PAK
programme.desc: Australia and Pakistan meet at the ICC Women's T20 World Cup.

programme.title: World Cup Report: ENG v GHA
programme.desc: A comprehensive round-up of all the day's World Cup news.

programme.title: World Cup Report
programme.desc: A comprehensive round-up of all the day's World Cup news.

programme.title: Blue Jays in 30
programme.desc: From June 21, 2026.

programme.title: Live: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: The Yankees and Tigers play the first game of a three-game series at Comerica Park in Detroit. Carlos Rodon is the expected starter for New York while Framber Valdez is expected to start for Detroit. The Tigers won 3-1 in a Spring Training matchup.

programme.title: Live: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: The Baltimore Orioles and the Los Angeles Angels meet for an opening match of a three-game series at Angel Stadium. Right-handed pitcher Kyle Bradish is the projected starter for Baltimore against left-handed pitcher Sam Aldegheri for Los Angeles.

programme.title: Blue Jays in 30
programme.desc: From June 22, 2026.

programme.title: World Poker Tour
programme.desc: Professional poker action from a series of international tournaments.

programme.title: Plays of the Month - Highlights
programme.desc: Highlighting the past month's best in daily sports moments.

programme.title: Gotta See It
programme.desc: Must-see moments from the world of sports.

programme.title: NHL's Best Goals of the Season
programme.desc: Highlights of the league's top scoring plays.

programme.title: NHL's Best Saves of the Season
programme.desc: Recap of the top saves of the NHL season.

programme.title: Welcome to the NHL: Meet the Prospects
programme.desc: Exclusive behind-the-scenes access to the top prospects in the NHL Draft. Gavin McKenna, Caleb Malhotra and Ivar Stenberg are predicted to be the top three picks by the Maple Leafs, Sharks and Canucks.

programme.title: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: The Houston Astros take on the Toronto Blue Jays at Rogers Centre in Game 2 of a three-game series. Houston's right-handed pitcher Peter Lambert (3.23 ERA) is the probable starter against Toronto's right-handed pitcher Trey Yesavage (3.76 ERA).

programme.desc: Professional poker action from a series of international tournaments.

programme.title: Live: Blair & Barker
programme.desc: Jeff Blair and Kevin Barker talk all things Blue Jays, and Major League Baseball.

programme.title: Live: The FAN Pregame
programme.desc: Ailish Forfar and Justin Cuthbert discuss the stories that matter most to sports fans.

programme.title: Live: Blue Jays Central
programme.desc: Toronto Blue Jays pregame show hosted by Jamie Campbell.

programme.title: Live: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: The Astros play the Blue Jays in Game 1 of a three-game series at Rogers Centre in Toronto. This is their first meeting this season, with Hunter Brown being the expected starting pitcher. The Blue Jays shut out the Astros 6-0 last season.

programme.title: Live: 2026 NBA Draft
programme.desc: NBA teams select basketball standouts to begin their professional careers, from Barclays Center in Brooklyn, N.Y.C.

programme.title: The Fishmonger
programme.desc: Tommy learns how the Yakima tribe harvests salmon and more on the Hood River.

programme.title: Wild Fish Masterclass With Mike Robinson
programme.desc: Mike and Chef James cook their version of a rich Spanish Basque style stew.

programme.title: The Obsession of Carter Andrews
programme.desc: Carter finds himself back home in Vero Beach, Fl after a season of adventure and travel just in time to intercept the hoards of mullet that migrate south along the beaches for one of natures' most impressive spectacles.

programme.title: Zona's Awesome Fishing Show
programme.desc: Hidden gems all over the country hold untold Bass treasures and today's shows up in an incredible way.

programme.title: Ultimate Match Fishing
programme.desc: Fletcher Shryock battles Spencer Shuffield in the first Semifinal.

programme.title: MLF Team Series
programme.desc: Four teams compete in Shreveport, LA for the Summit Cup Championship Trophy.

programme.title: The Hunt for Monster Bass
programme.desc: There are thousands of lakes in central Florida, and bass in every one of them. But for Chris Lane, finding a giant can be like finding a needle in a haystack.

programme.title: The Hunt for Monster Bass
programme.desc: Bassmaster Classic Champion Ott DeFoe hunts down massive Smallmouth Bass in this untouched river. Shallow waters could force Ott to wade up the river to land this monster.

programme.title: Lisa Roper Outdoors
programme.desc: Welcome to Lisa Roper Outdoors, where every episode is a journey into the heart of outdoor adventure; from breathtaking landscapes to mouthwatering shore lunches, Lisa Roper brings you along as she connects with nature in a way that stirs the soul.

programme.title: The New Fly Fisher
programme.desc: Mark Melnyk and Tom Rosenbauer are in Southern Chile fishing New Waters to them and the guides.

programme.title: Connect Fishing Experiences
programme.desc: It is summer, so Josh puts the downriggers away and spends a day jigging the shallow waters around the lighthouse at Blubber Bay.

programme.title: Extreme Angler TV
programme.desc: Fishing for early season walleye on Lake Nipissing with jig and minnow and finding schools of twenty-inch plus walleyes.

programme.title: The Fish'n Canada Show
programme.desc: Angling adventures from Newfoundland to British Columbia.

programme.title: Westcoast Sporting Journal
programme.desc: Celebrating British Columbia's and Mexico's hottest outfitters and saltwater sportfishing destinations each week.

programme.title: BC Outdoors Sportfishing
programme.desc: Host Mike Mitchell and guests fish throughout British Columbia.

programme.title: Fishing the Wild West
programme.desc: Early fall cold front walleye and northern pike with G&S Marina Outfitters in southern Saskatchewan.

programme.title: Fight Sports: Grand Sumo
programme.desc: This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 5 featuring Kakuryu, Tochinoshin, Shodai and Hakuho from the Natsu basho, 2018.

programme.title: Fight Sports: Grand Sumo
programme.desc: Show 1 featuring Harumafuji, Kotooshu, Goeido and Kotoshogiku from the Nagoya basho, 2015.

programme.title: Pure Outdoor
programme.desc: Outdoor sports from all over the world, from freestyle ski jumping to airplane aerobatics.

programme.title: Offroad Odyssey
programme.desc: Adrenaline-pumping action, breathtaking scenery, and unforgettable encounter off-road.

programme.title: A Fishing Story With Ronnie Green
programme.desc: Veteran angler Ronnie Green shares his passion for fishing and celebrating the small things in life with entertaining guests who share their inspiring fish tales.

programme.desc: Featuring exclusive interviews and features with the biggest names in tennis.

programme.title: She's in the Game
programme.desc: Meet the next generation of superstar female athletes around the country as we go behind the scenes to shine the light on them and their interests off the field, along with catching up with the female legends who paved the way for all this growth.

programme.title: The Card Life
programme.desc: We learn about the hobby and business of sports card collecting.

programme.title: Hobby House
programme.desc: This month, late spring is keeping everyone in the shop busy. Chuck and Audrey spend a full day giving back with the Eagles, Phillies and 76ers. Phillies legend Larry Bowa also discusses some baseball cards from his long career.

programme.title: Charlie Moore Outdoors
programme.desc: America's Mad Fisherman heads to the Green Mountain State of Vermont and fishes with long-time friend Joel St. Germain. Although fishing is good, the weather becomes the real issue.

programme.title: Charlie Moore Outdoors
programme.desc: Charlie heads to Charleston, S.C. He takes a haunted horse tour and meets up with long-time friend Chris Floyd to fish for sea trout and red fish; Charlie takes a stroll through historical downtown Charleston; Charlie tries the local sushi.

programme.title: Fair Territory with Ken Rosenthal
programme.desc: MLB insider Ken Rosenthal covers baseball's latest news and pressing issues.

programme.title: Steel City Chronicles
programme.desc: Bob Walk, aka The Whirly Bird, had a Pirates' legacy marked by resilience, versatility, and memorable postseason moments, cementing his place in the team's history both as a player and later as a beloved voice on the air.

programme.title: Live: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: From PNC Park in Pittsburgh.
